description: Taught Math and ICT while serving as ICT Coordinator and SMEA data lead. Built VBA automation that eliminated 100% of manual reporting across 50+ faculty, reducing quarterly report generation from days to minutes. Maintained ICT infrastructure, coached student publications to national-level competition, and managed school-wide data systems.
Graduated with GWA 1.55. DOST Junior Level Science Scholar. Served as editor of The Pillar publication and active member of ICpEP. Built foundation in programming, algorithms, and embedded systems.
